message:
fix(time): prevent fallback timer thread leak in Sleep and fix premature tick consumption in Interval

sleep: Fix a thread leak in the fallback timer path. Previously, a
fallback thread that had logically completed (set the waker) but whose OS
thread had not yet fully exited would be missed by take_finished_fallback,
which only checked JoinHandle::is_finished(). Introduces:
- A completed: Arc<AtomicBool> flag set by the thread before exit
- A zombie_fallbacks: Vec<JoinHandle<()>> for threads logically done but
  not yet joinable
- take_finished_fallbacks (plural) collects both truly finished and
  logically-completed-but-not-yet-exited threads
- All stop/replace/drop paths now properly collect and join zombies

interval: Set first_tick_done = true in poll_tick when a tick fires, which
was previously missing. Remove special first-tick behavior in tick() that
consumed the interval before the deadline elapsed, preventing premature
tick consumption when the caller checks time early.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
